data.name: SEX Massage 2 🔞
data.detailed_description:
Keep your struggling massaging parlour afloat in our promising sequel - SEX Massage 2 🔞! Try your hand at being a talented masseur who’s determined to make his business break new ground. Stay strong - the path to success is a journey filled with temptation!

You’re playing as a determined owner of a massage business on the brink of closure. You have to make the most out of your management, client service, communication and creativity skills to successfully navigate the struggles of daily operations while forming some meaningful connections with your clients and staff - keeping the business is easier said than done.

The fate of your parlour lies in your hands! Navigate through the everyday challenges with the help of your skills and people around. You’re not alone - meet your witty administrator, Olivia, delivery guy Sam, who’s providing high-quality oils and such to you, and a regular client, Grace, who’s giving you hope and determination with her offer to recommend your business to friends.

James, your friend who’s working in a nearby café, would provide some help too, but when the moment comes, you’ll have to rely on the help of Hannah, a local blogger becoming a potential ally in boosting your place’s reputation through her influence.

Manage appointments, order supplies, make the right choices and leave your clients satisfied with the service as you explore themes of support, community, romance, flirtation, hope and passion - make the most of each situation and opportunity, and make your business strive again!

Features:
  • Hot and steamy adult content! 🔞 As the name suggests, you’re going to give massages, let alone people whose hearts you can steal outside of the massage room!
  • 3D graphics - for maximum immersion and even hotter 18+ content, we’ve prepared pretty high-quality visuals and animations for you.
  • Varied plot - your decisions make a difference! Decide how to handle business duties and personal relationships.
  • Mini-games - take a break from the story and test your precision and timing!
  • Immersive world - unique characters, interesting dialogues, unexpected outcomes and fun places to visit!
  • Easy-to-learn gameplay - one-handed playthrough wouldn’t even be a challenge 😜

data.short_description: Enter the captivating world of the visual novel SEX Massage 2 🔞, where you take on the role of Daniel, a talented masseur and owner of a small massage parlor. Daniel is determined to elevate his business to new heights, but the path to success is filled with challenges and temptations.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

data.supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Bulgarian, Vietnamese, Greek, Danish, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Norwegian, Dutch, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Romanian, Thai, Turkish, Hungarian, Ukrainian, Finnish, Czech, Swedish, Japanese, Indonesian, Spanish - Latin America

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 or higher
  • Processor: Intel or AMD
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX compatible graphics card
  • Storage: 3 GB available space
